calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Nov-13-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom):

Craig C. Daniel, Esq., of GLUCK DANIEL ATKINSON LLP, (415) 510-2114, for Plaintiff.

JOEL D. BRODFUEHRER, Esq., of GORDON REES SCULLY MANSUKHANI, LLP, for Defendant.

RE: Plaintiff's petition to compel arbitration.

Ruling is argued. At conclusion of argument, the court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's unopposed petition to compel arbitration is granted.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***After hearing, an order is signed.
